title: Copy contents of File column
excerpt: I want to copy the contents of a Files Column from one row to another row in the same group. I tried using the built-in Monday.com “copy cell” and “paste” but when I select paste nothing happens and the cell remains empt…

posts.author: bhamiltonedu (Belinda Hamilton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to copy the contents of a Files Column from one row to another row in the same group. I tried using the built-in Monday.com “copy cell” and “paste” but when I select paste nothing happens and the cell remains empty.

image839×85 5.91 KB

Any ideas?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bhamiltonedu ,

Welcome to the monday community!

This possibly seems like a bug to me. It is true that copy cell value and paste does not work on the files column, but I can see that you duplicated the first line. The files should carry over.

image1071×147 15.2 KB

I did upload a file from my computer, so perhaps some specific cases do not work?

I would suggest asking monday support for assistance!

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: bhamiltonedu (Belinda Hamilton)
posts.cookedHtml:
It only looks like a duplication of the row above because of the name but it was a brand-new row, so no files were missing because of a duplication gone wrong!

Still looking for answers.

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Belinda!

Monday.com doesn’t have a direct file copy-paste feature within the Files Column. However, you can achieve this by manually uploading the same file to another item.

Hopefully they will add this feature soon!

Cheers.

Shanine from Mindflows

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bhamiltonedu

You can use Copy Files Pro.

Using this app you can easily copy files between same item’s file columns, different item’s file columns, and to items present on another board.
